findings.description: Section s2 merges two h3 subsections (「1件のデータを更新する場合」and「複数件を一括で更新する場合」) into a single section. The combined content exceeds 2000 characters and the source has distinct h3-level headings (marked with `=====`), so these should be split into separate sections (e.g., s2 and s3).
findings.source_evidence: Source has h3 headings: `1件のデータを更新する場合` (===) and `複数件を一括で更新する場合` (===) under the h2 `更新(insert、update、delete)`. Knowledge file s2 contains both subsections in a single section well exceeding 2000 chars.
